name: Sausage and Cornbread Cabbage Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the center vein of cabbage leaves, keeping each leaf intact.
2. Place the leaves in a shallow baking dish. Cover with vented clear plastic wrap.
3. Cook in the microwave, covered, on 100% power for 1 to 3 minutes or until the leaves are limp.
4. In a bowl, stir together egg, half of the chopped apple, stuffing mix, and 2 tablespoons apple juice or cider. Add sausage; mix well.
5. Divide the meat mixture into four portions. Place one portion on each cabbage leaf.
6. Fold in the sides, starting at the unfolded edge, and roll up each leaf, ensuring folded edges are included in the roll.
7. Arrange the rolls in a shallow baking dish. Pour water over the rolls.
8. Cover with vented clear plastic wrap. Cook in the microwave, covered, on 100% power for 12 to 14 minutes, rotating the dish a half-turn after 7 minutes.
9. Transfer the rolls to a serving platter. Cover and keep warm.
10. For sauce, stir together half cup apple juice or cider, cornstarch, and instant beef bouillon granules in a 2-cup measure.
11. Stir in the remaining chopped apple. Cook in the microwave, uncovered, on 100% power for 2 to 2 1/2 minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds.
12. Spoon sauce over the cabbage rolls.
